summary: Iteration 137: Tested delete confirmation dialog (React AlertDialog instead of window.confirm), Camera Setup tab with IP Camera/USB Webcam modes, and WhatsApp message format. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Delete dialog shows proper React AlertDialog with Hindi text 'Kya aap ye transaction delete karna chahte hain?', page doesn't freeze after delete, Camera Setup has IP Camera (Network) and USB Webcam toggle buttons with URL inputs.
seed_data_creation: Created test entries during testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Delete confirmation uses React AlertDialog (ConfirmProvider.jsx) with useConfirm() hook - NOT window.confirm. Dialog shows 'Kya aap ye transaction delete karna chahte hain?' with 'Nahi' (Cancel) and 'Haan, Karein' (Confirm) buttons. Page remains responsive after delete. 2) Camera Setup tab (Settings > Camera) has two toggle buttons: 'IP Camera (Network)' and 'USB Webcam'. IP mode shows Front Camera URL and Side Camera URL inputs. USB mode shows camera device dropdowns. Save Camera Config button saves to localStorage. 3) WhatsApp message format in backend includes RST#, Date, Farmer/Mandi, Packets, separator lines (───), and ₹ symbol for cash/diesel.

features_tested.delete_dialog_react_alertdialog: PASS - Uses React AlertDialog from ConfirmProvider, not window.confirm
features_tested.delete_dialog_hindi_text: PASS - Shows 'Kya aap ye transaction delete karna chahte hain?'
features_tested.delete_cancel_closes_dialog: PASS - Cancel button closes dialog, entry NOT deleted
features_tested.delete_page_responsive: PASS - Page remains responsive after delete operations
features_tested.camera_setup_front_url_input: PASS - Front Camera URL input field exists in IP mode
features_tested.camera_setup_side_url_input: PASS - Side Camera URL input field exists in IP mode
features_tested.camera_setup_mode_switch: PASS - Switching between IP and USB modes works
features_tested.backend_message_format_rupee: PASS - Message includes ₹ symbol for cash/diesel
